for name in ['xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml']:

    print(name, 'xml_ok')
PY

task: Advanced high-value task: Slo Burn-Rate Window Scenario Stress Ranking. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for slo burn-rate window. Embedded packet: Records: R1 error_count=46 request_count=72 window_minutes=5; R2 error_count=55 request_count=68 window_minutes=8; R3 error_count=41 request_count=83 window_minutes=4. Remediation options: O1 changes error_count by -12% cost=80000; O2 changes request_count by -18% cost=97200; O3 changes window_minutes by -25% cost=56800; max_budget=122400. Rules and constraints: burn_rate=(error_rate)/(1-SLO); page when short and long windows exceed policy; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver SLO_burn_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
